name: VRE-PARFE-HydroRE
description: Extension Set for hardware-attested, ledger-anchored renewable energy generation dMRV. Reference implementation: run-of-river hydropower station (Mauritius). Issuing authority: Three T's (Mauritius) Limited. Verification layer: Hedera Consensus Service (HCS).

modules.name: Renewable Energy Certificate Module
modules.description: Issues REC tokens (kWh) for verified renewable energy generation. One REC represents 100 kWh of hardware-attested renewable generation. ISO 14064-1:2018 compliant.

modules.name: Water Stewardship Certificate Module
modules.description: Issues H2O tokens (m³) for verified water flow in run-of-river hydropower operation. One H2O token represents 5,000 litres of verified water flow. ISO 14046:2014 compliant.

modules.name: Carbon Offset Certificate Module
modules.description: Issues CO2 tokens (kgCO₂e) representing the Grid Emission Factor (GEF)-adjusted carbon offset derived from verified renewable generation. co2Amount = measurementValue × gef. ISO 14064-1:2018 compliant.
